name: pr_cep_allen_inf_chain_crossrule_gone1
drl:
rule R1 when $a : A() $b : B(this coincides $a) then end
rule R2 when $b : B() $c : C(this after[0ms,100ms] $b) then end
comment: D-164 Allen @expires-inference reach pin: cross-RULE chains do NOT compose — the dependency matrix is per-rule (reach 0 from the coincides rule alone). Facts-only probe (no join partner ⇒ deliberately inert firings).
